events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes column/beam erection & plumb work that is rough-complete, with the checkpoint scope finished for this area. Remaining work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside the checkpoint. No defects or hazards are mentioned. Reference materials are AISC 303 and OSHA 1926 Subpart R.

This seems like a pass situation - the work is complete for the checkpoint, no defects flagged, remaining work is outside the scope being scored.
